name: analyse-design

name: code-review

name: create-mcp-app

Covers dataset preparation, Whisper-based validation, training configuration, and ONNX export.

name: indexing-strategy

name: instruction-design-and-validation

name: liquidity-and-price-dynamics-explainer

name: pump-fun-mechanics

name: social-signal-bot

name: token-analysis-checklist
description: Comprehensive token analysis for rug detection - LP analysis, authority checks, holder distribution, insider patterns, and red flags. Use before buying any Solana token.

name: token-distribution-planning
